title: Vayathu Vaa Vaa Solgirathu Song Lyrics Thulluvadho Ilamai
stanzas: <div>Vayathu Vaa Vaa Solgirathu Song Lyrics Thulluvadho Ilamai

Vayathu vaa vaa solgirathu
iniyum thadai enna kaetkirathu
unakkum enakkum mathiyile
oru madhil suvarthaan
indru ezhugirathu (2)

kadhal nilave kadhal nilave
velicham vendaam poividu
kangal moodu kanavil naanum
avalai cherum kaalam idhu

Vayathu vaa vaa solgirathu
iniyum thadai enna kaetkirathu
unakkum enakkum mathiyile
oru madhil suvarthaan
indru ezhugirathu

thalai mudhal kaal varai
nee oru ragasiyam
ah ah vayadhuku vanthapin
ovvondrum adhisayam

oru poo vaasame unmel
idhunala mattume kanden
adhu pen vaasamaai vaara
adhai nana swaasamaai konden

Vayathu vaa vaa solgirathu
iniyum thadai enna kaetkirathu
unakkum enakkum mathiyile
oru madhil suvarthaan
indru ezhugirathu

panithuli serkiren
en viral nuniyile
un idhazhgalil ootrinen

un neruvazhamum kooda
adi saathaaranam netru
un kaal kendaiyin venmai
adhil thee moottuthe indru

Vayathu vaa vaa solgirathu
iniyum thadai enna kaetkirathu
unakkum enakkum mathiyile
oru madhil suvarthaan
indru ezhugirathu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses the feelings of love and longing, highlighting the beauty of romantic moments.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Thulluvadho Ilamai, this song captures the youthful exuberance and emotional connection between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Harini and Srinivas, whose voices blend beautifully to convey the song's emotions.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by Yuvan Shankar Raja, known for his innovative sound and melodies.

When was this song released?

This song was released in 2002, becoming an instant hit among fans of Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vayathu Vaa Vaa Solgirathu, the characters experience the thrill of young love, as they navigate their emotions and dreams. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia, making it relatable to anyone who has experienced love. It beautifully encapsulates the joy and innocence of romantic moments, resonating with listeners long after its release. The collaboration between Harini and Srinivas, under Yuvan's masterful direction, adds depth to this timeless classic.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vayathu Vaa Vaa Solgirathu from Thulluvadho Ilamai is a melodious duet that beautifully captures the essence of young love. With the enchanting voices of Harini and Srinivas, paired with Yuvan's captivating composition, this song resonates with nostalgia and joy. Dive into the lyrical magic that makes this track a timeless favorite for romantic occasions.
stanzaMeanings: Come, come, it says, what is the obstacle now? Today, a wall is rising in our minds, for both you and me.
Love moon, love moon, no need for light, close your eyes, in dreams, I will be with her, this is the time.
Come, come, it says, what is the obstacle now? Today, a wall is rising in our minds, for both you and me.
From the beginning until now, you are a secret, ah, when you came to this world, everything is amazing.
I saw only you, like a flower, that is why I took it as a breath, it came as a woman.
Ah, why am I feeling this for the first time?
Come, come, it says, what is the obstacle now? Today, a wall is rising in our minds, for both you and me.
I am mixing the dew with my fingers, in your eyes, I am pouring it.
Your presence is also a blessing, yesterday, your feet were the truth, today, it burns in that.
When I see your gaze, my heart trembles.
Come, come, it says, what is the obstacle now? Today, a wall is rising in our minds, for both you and me.
Love moon, love moon, no need for light, close your eyes, in dreams, I will be with her, this is the time.
Come, come, it says, what is the obstacle now? Today, a wall is rising in our minds, for both you and me.
